description_long: This obelisk structure features two tall, cylindrical stone pillars with ornate tops, connected by a decorative chain. Between the pillars stands a central vertical element with a twisted, vine-like design, topped with a pointed tip and flanked by two curved, leaf-like metal forms. The entire assembly is mounted on a circular stone pedestal, which itself sits on a square, textured stone platform resembling weathered paving. The materials appear aged, with visible patina and surface roughness, suggesting exposure to the elements. The overall design is both monumental and ornamental, evoking a sense of historical or ceremonial significance.
description: A pair of ornate stone pillars with a decorative chain flank a central, vine-like obelisk on a circular pedestal atop a textured stone platform. The structure features aged stone and metal elements with intricate detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows both pillars, the central obelisk with vine and leaf motifs, and the full circular pedestal on the square platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlights one pillar in the foreground, partially obscuring the central obelisk and pedestal, with the chain visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing both pillars and the central obelisk, but with lighting and shadows reversed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single pillar in the foreground, obscuring much of the central structure and pedestal.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative chain connecting the tops of the pillars, vine and leaf motifs on the central obelisk, and ornate pillar capitals.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of a circular stone pedestal with a slightly raised edge, set on a square, textured stone platform resembling rough paving.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the central obelisk is pointed and features a twisted, vine-like design with a small, triangular finial.
attribute_surrounding_features: Two stone pillars with chains, all mounted on a square stone platform; no additional surrounding features visible.
